title: glaucium corniculatum var. tricolorum
intro: Glaucium corniculatum var. tricolorum, also known as the red poppy or horned poppy, is a plant species in the poppy family Papaveraceae. The plant's root and seeds have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Glaucium corniculatum var. tricolorum include relief from pain, inflammation, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant may include root infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be under the guidance of a qualified healthcare practitioner due to potential toxicity.
